{{Quote|With most humans, it's usually sex or love.|Gwad Raatu|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Tempest">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref>}}
'''Gwad Raatu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] with the [[Police rank|rank]] of [[Detective/Legends|detective]] in the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]]. He was sent to investigate the [[Duel in the Fellowship Plaza|death]] of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Tresina Lobi]]. He, along with his partner, [[Chal Tozr]], questioned Jedi Masters [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] about the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Tresina. As a Rodian the investigation got his hunting instincts worked up and he later joined Luke and Mara as they investigated [[Lumiya]]'s [[Apartment three hundred seven twelve|apartment]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
